creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Harald,
By any chance do you have a work around for the original broken version 
of 450.status.security in 9.1-RELEASE?  I submitted PR conf/178611 for a 
patch in 9.1-RELEASE and have been using the patched version 
successfully with the same options ever since.  I have also tested 
9.2-RC3 and do not see the issue described. Additionally, 6 lines below 
the suggested patch the "rc=1" used get overridden anyway by an explicit 
"rc=3;;" used to always show the inline case.  See the link below for 
the original PR from a few months ago for more details.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=178611

Respectfully,
Jason Unovitch
